mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
SELECT * FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (isbn, title, author, publisher, publish_date, category, location, total_count, available_count, price, cover_url, description, status) VALUES (#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{category}, #{location}, #{totalCount}, #{availableCount}, #{price}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET available_count = #{availableCount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND available_count > 0
UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND available_count < total_count
mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM book GROUP BY category
SELECT * FROM book WHERE category = #{category} AND available_count > 0 AND status = 1
SELECT bk.* FROM book bk LEFT JOIN borrowing br ON bk.id = br.book_id WHERE bk.status = 1 AND bk.available_count > 0 GROUP BY bk.id ORDER BY COUNT(br.id) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT b.title AS title, COUNT(br.id) AS count FROM book b LEFT JOIN borrowing br ON b.id = br.book_id WHERE b.status = 1 GROUP BY b.id, b.title ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
